events.title: KOKOROKO (SFJAZZ Summer Sessions)
events.description: London Afrobeat and highlife collective opening the 2026 SFJAZZ Summer Sessions. KOKOROKO blend West African rhythms with jazz and soul into something genuinely joyful.

events.title: Messer Chups
events.description: Russian surf-horror instrumentals with theremin and go-go dancing. Strange, fun, and tight.

events.title: TsuShiMaMiRe
events.description: All-women Japanese punk trio — fast, loud, and charismatic. A cult live act.

events.title: Plummet (w/ UFO Baby, Anna Hillburg, Asha Wells)
events.description: Total Accord Presents: a stacked indie bill at the beloved underground Cafe du Nord.

events.title: Fai Laci (w/ Trestles)
events.cost_notes: check ticketweb for price, all ages
events.description: All-ages indie show at Cafe du Nord.

events.title: Every Move A Picture
events.description: Post-punk and new wave at SF's best small rock club.

events.title: A Tribute to Don Prell & SeaBop
events.description: Intimate jazz tribute with Jim Grantham (tenor sax), Scott Foster (guitar), Ollie Dudek (bass), Omar Aran (drums). Bird & Beckett is a true neighborhood gem.

events.title: Willie Jones III Quartet ft. Jeremy Pelt
events.description: Three-night residency from drummer Willie Jones III's quartet featuring Jeremy Pelt on trumpet. Hard bop at its best.

events.title: Igor & the Red Elvises
events.description: Russian rockabilly surf-punk and comedy. A Bottom of the Hill institution.

events.title: Olive Jones US & Canada Tour 2026
events.cost_notes: check ticketweb for price, all ages
events.description: All-ages indie show at Cafe du Nord.

events.title: Noel Jewkes & Friends Birthday Bash
events.description: Noel Jewkes (reeds) celebrates his birthday with Keith Saunders (piano), Heshima Mark Williams (bass), Mark Lee (drums), and Kay Kostopoulos (vocals). Classic SF jazz.

events.title: Christian Mistress
events.description: Pacific Northwest heavy metal with NWOBHM hooks. One of the better live acts in that world.

events.title: Smith Dobson Quartet + Guilhem Fourty Quartet
events.description: Two quartets in one evening at the Glen Park jazz institution.

events.title: Half Past Two
events.description: California ska and reggae band. Sunday night crowd-pleaser at Bottom of the Hill.

events.title: Cheaper Than Therapy
events.description: Five to six hand-picked experienced comedians every Wed–Sun at the historic Shelton Theater. Full bar, no drink minimum. Bar opens 7pm, doors 7pm, last seating 8:05pm.

events.title: SF Comedy Showcase at Punch Line
events.description: San Francisco's premier comedy club weekly showcase. 444 Battery St. Tickets from punchlinecomedyclub.com or box office.

events.title: Jay Alexander: San Francisco Magic Theater
events.description: 75-minute magic and mentalism show by Jay Alexander. Pre-show close-up magic in the lounge one hour before. Intimate and genuinely surprising.

events.title: Cheaper Than Therapy
events.description: Five to six hand-picked stand-up comedians. Full bar, no drink minimum. Weekly Wed–Sun at the Shelton Theater.

events.title: SF Comedy Showcase at Punch Line
events.description: Weekly Sunday showcase at San Francisco's premier comedy club.

events.title: Minnesota Street Project — Gallery Complex
events.description: Multiple galleries in one building. On now: Adler Guerrier's 'Prim and mottled forms' (re.riddle, through Jul 18); Arthur Drooker's 'Twilight' photos (Themes + Projects, through Jun 27); 'How to See Ruth Asawa' (through Jun 20 — closing soon); 'Memory Cradle' by Kate Tova & Anastasia Tumanova (Eleanor Harwood, through Jul 18).

events.title: ICA SF — Current Exhibitions
events.description: ICA SF is nomadic. Currently: Tara Donovan 'Stratagems'; Lily Kwong 'EARTHSEED DOME'; Jeffrey Gibson 'THIS BURNING WORLD' (vinyl facade at SF Centre on Mission); Patrick Martinez 'Dogpatch Community Court'. Check icasf.org for exact locations.

events.title: Fraenkel Gallery — Slice of the Pie
events.description: Group show featuring fourteen Bay Area galleries and their distinctive characters. On view through Aug 15. Tue–Fri 10:30am–5:30pm, Sat 11am–5pm. 49 Geary St, 4th floor.

events.title: The Living Hand — Opening Reception (Chung 24 Gallery)
events.description: Opening reception for 'The Living Hand,' running June 17 – August 1. Free and open to the public.

events.title: Dance Fridays — Salsa & Bachata
events.description: SF's largest Latin dance social. Lessons for all levels, then social dancing till 1:30am. Two rooms: salsa and bachata. 21+ with ID.

events.title: Dance Fridays — Salsa & Bachata
events.description: Weekly Friday Latin dance social — lessons followed by open social dancing till 1:30am. Two rooms: salsa and bachata. 21+ with ID.

events.title: Chat Room: Food and Gazetteer
events.description: Evening event at the beautiful Swedish American Hall. Check venue for details.

events.title: Metalachi
events.description: The world's only heavy metal mariachi band. A reliably fun and ridiculous night at Cafe du Nord.
